title: Small updates to OCI spec generation
body:
Firstly, when adding the privileged catch-all resource device, first remove the spec's default catch-all resource device.

Second, remove our default rootfs propogation config - Docker does not set this by default, so I don't think we should either.

Two of the last significant changes from my examination of our OCI spec vs Docker's.

comments.body:
I think you should at least try to mount something into your podman and then mount on top of it.

```
mkdir -p /var/lib/test/mnt
podman run -ti -v /var/lib/test:/var/lib/test:Z,slave fedora /bin/sh
```

Now in a different window.

```
mount -o tmpfs tmpfs /var/lib/test/mnt
```
Back in the original window, inside the container execute 
```
mount | grep /var/lib/test
```

Does it see the tmpfs?

The tests are somehow all green.
@rh-atomic-bot r=TomSweeneyRedHat
